dsl_rule.translation_notes: Entry: Short sale day opens lower than previous close, enter immediately on open. Exit: If the same day closes higher than the open, exit the position (reject entry). The logic uses a same-bar exit condition to prevent position entry if close > open on the signal bar.

backtest_rule.reason: Entry: Short sale day opens lower than previous close, enter immediately on open. Exit: If the same day closes higher than the open, exit the position (reject entry). The logic uses a same-bar exit condition to prevent position entry if close > open on the signal bar.

source_rule_text: Enter a short position immediately on the open of a short sale day if it opens lower; if the short sale day opens lower and closes higher, take no position.
